case_title: ACUNA, FRANCISCO A. VS VILLAFLOR, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE TO TO ANDREW VILLAFLOR FILED ONLY NOT ENTERED. #5-A NO DATE AND TIME OF SERVICE.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,860.00 FILED BY ACUNA, FRANCISCO A. AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAFLOR, EDWARD VILLAFLOR, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL OF DEFT'S CLAIM SENT TO FRANCISCO ACUNA RETURNED--UNCLAIMED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACUNA, FRANCISCO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLAFLOR, EDWARD VILLAFLOR, ANDREW $1,380.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,412.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PLTF & DEFT ARE EACH 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT VILLAFLOR, EDWARD VILLAFLOR, ANDREW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ACUNA, FRANCISCO A. PLTF WAIVES NO SERVICE. CROSS COMPLAINANT AND CROSS DEFENDANT ARE EACH 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $925.71 FILED BY VILLAFLOR, EDWARD VILLAFLOR, ANDREW AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ACUNA, FRANCISCO A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF ACUNA, FRANCISCO A.
